summary: Iteration 109: Multi-Layer Visual Stack System - All features verified. Visual Stack section with + Light, + Video, + Fractal, + Filter buttons working. Layer stacking, opacity controls, visibility toggles, remove buttons, and clear all functioning correctly. Presets and Journeys buttons still work. Loading presets populates visual stack. Frequency and Sound channels work alongside visual layers.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing presets and journeys
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-layer Visual Stack system fully implemented. 4 layer types: Light (6 modes), Video (5 overlays), Fractal (6 types), Filter (12 types). Each layer has: color dot, type icon, name, opacity slider (0-100%), eye toggle for visibility, trash button for removal, reorder arrows on hover. Layers render with z-index 30 + layer index. Fractals use HTML5 Canvas with audio-reactive data from Web Audio API analyser.

features_verified.visual_stack_section: PASS - data-testid='visual-layers-mixer' visible in Production Console
features_verified.add_light_button: PASS - data-testid='add-light-btn' opens light picker with 6 options
features_verified.add_video_button: PASS - data-testid='add-video-btn' opens video picker with 5 options
features_verified.add_fractal_button: PASS - data-testid='add-fractal-btn' opens fractal picker with 6 options
features_verified.add_filter_button: PASS - data-testid='add-filter-btn' opens filter picker with 12 options
features_verified.light_layer_aurora: PASS - pick-light-aurora adds Aurora layer to stack
features_verified.video_layer_starfield: PASS - pick-video-stars adds Starfield layer to stack
features_verified.fractal_layer_sacred_geometry: PASS - pick-fractal-sacred-geo adds Sacred Geometry layer with canvas overlay
features_verified.filter_layer_bloom: PASS - pick-filter-bloom adds Bloom filter layer to stack
features_verified.per_layer_opacity: PASS - layer-opacity-{uid} slider adjusts each layer independently
features_verified.visibility_toggle: PASS - layer-vis-{uid} hides/shows individual layers without removing
features_verified.remove_button: PASS - layer-remove-{uid} removes layer from stack
features_verified.clear_all_button: PASS - clear-all-layers removes all visual layers
features_verified.presets_button: PASS - presets-browse-btn opens presets panel with Staff Picks/Community/My Presets tabs
features_verified.journeys_button: PASS - playlists-browse-btn opens journeys panel with Curated/Community/My Journeys tabs
features_verified.preset_loads_visual_stack: PASS - Loading preset populates visual stack with saved layers
features_verified.frequency_channel: PASS - mixer-freq-528 activates 528 Hz frequency alongside visual layers
features_verified.sound_channel: PASS - mixer-sound-rain activates Rain sound alongside visual layers
